## Notes

- Perplexity over the first 25600 tokens of WikiText-2 (raw, test); all variants score the identical prefix. Not comparable to published sliding-window numbers.
- HellaSwag accuracy over the first 100 validation items (length-normalized log-likelihood scoring).
- Latency/throughput: mean over 3 runs of 64 tokens after 1 warmup run(s). Peak metal covers everything since the variant's model load; RSS is host-side only.
- Energy sampling unavailable: powermetrics requires passwordless sudo (sudo: a password is required).
